# Copilot Instructions

This workspace contains a Python project for connecting to Spotify and SoundCloud APIs, and web scraping song chords.

- Use Python 3.12.1
- Install dependencies from requirements.txt
- Set up .env with API keys
- Run main.py to test connections and scraping

## Project Structure

- main.py: Entry point
- spotify_api.py: Spotify API functions
- soundcloud_api.py: SoundCloud API functions
- scraper.py: Web scraping functions
- requirements.txt: Dependencies
- .env: API credentials (not committed)
